execution_steps: Run 'loom start <task_id>' to lock active context
Implement Code in src/ (Green Phase) - MUST add @trace <task_id>
Review implementation against Definition of Done (DoD) from the task context. Do not complete unless all criteria are met.
Execute the command defined in tdd_cycle.verification_command and ensure the output indicates a passing state BEFORE calling loom_complete.
definition_of_done: All modified source files have @trace annotation
loom validate passes (Checks Traces/Metadata only, DOES NOT run code tests)
